seo_description: Get in touch with Lost Unfound Records. We work with a small number of artists at a time — the earlier you reach out, the better.
lead: If you have a project — finished, half-formed, or still just a feeling — we'd love to hear about it. We work with a small number of artists at a time, so the earlier you get in touch, the better.
response_time: We aim to reply within 48 hours.
